data.title: Live Love Spa celebrates National Wellness Month with flagship event in LA, promoting self-care. Aug. 1, 2025. #WellnessMonth
data.description: An initiative spanning across the country is encouraging people to focus on self-care, featuring a main event in Los Angeles that showcases the newest wellness developments. The flagship event in Los Angeles is on August 1, 2025, marking the return of National Wellness Month, with a focus on promoting well-being through various activities and innovations.

data.title: Ambassador Suzan Johnson Cook backs Freedom Plaza in op-ed, emphasizing equity and values for Manhattan's East Side vision.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Rev. Dr. Ambassador Suzan Johnson Cook made a significant statement of endorsement for Freedom Plaza, a groundbreaking civic and cultural initiative on Manhattan's East Side launched by Soloviev Group and Mohegan. The op-ed emphasizes Rev. Dr. Ambassador Johnson Cook's public backing for this transformative project, highlighting its potential to redefine the area.

data.title: Gary Levenbach is appointed as President and Chief Actuary of Independence American Insurance Company by IPH.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Independence Pet Holdings, Inc. (IPH) revealed that Gary Levenbach has been named as the President and Chief Actuary of its branch, Independence American Insurance Company (IAIC). Levenbach brings over 20 years of experience in actuarial and finance fields to this role.

data.title: Insta360 adds Strava compatibility to Stats Dashboard for active outdoor athletes; view real-time data seamlessly in videos.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Insta360 introduced Strava compatibility for its Stats Dashboard feature. This allows cyclists and outdoor athletes to incorporate real-time performance data within their videos. The feature provides a new visualization tool for tracking and analyzing performance metrics.

data.title: SiMa.ai secures $85M funding, total now $355M. Oversubscribed round led by Maverick Capital, StepStone Group joins.
data.description: In an oversubscribed round of funding led by Maverick Capital, SiMa.ai, a company based in San Jose, California, specializing in purpose-built hardware and software solutions for Physical AI, has secured $85 million. Additionally, StepStone Group has come on board as a new investor. The funding round indicates strong interest and support for SiMa.ai's innovative approach to AI technology.

data.title: Ian T. Clark appointed to BioMarin's Board of Directors, previously CEO of Genentech.
data.description: In San Rafael, California, on August 1, 2025, BioMarin Pharmaceutical Inc. (Nasdaq: BMRN) revealed the appointment of Ian T. Clark to their Board of Directors, starting immediately on the same day. Clark, former Chief Executive Officer of Genentech, joins the board bringing his expertise along with him.

data.title: Popilush opens 3,000 sq. ft. store in Las Vegas, marking its expansion into physical retail from online.
data.description: Renowned shapewear brand, Popilush, known for its viral fashion pieces, has ventured into physical retail by launching its inaugural flagship store in New York City. The 3,000 square foot space marks a significant achievement for the award-winning brand.

data.title: NeuroSense, a biotech company, reports progress in H1 2025. Specializes in treatments for neurodegenerative diseases.
data.description: NeuroSense Therapeutics Ltd., a leading clinical biotechnology company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, shared a corporate update on July 31, 2025. The company, listed on the NASDAQ as NRSN, focuses on developing innovative therapies for severe neurodegenerative disorders. They highlighted recent achievements and progress in their late-stage clinical trials.
Ownership interest in company disclosed, holds significant number of shares.

data.title: EPSO-G plans to refinance a significant amount of short-term financial debt for Amber Grid.
data.description: In a recent report, it has been disclosed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease compared to the previous quarter. The number of new jobs created in the last month alone reached a record-breaking 300,000, with the majority of positions being in the service industry. Additionally, the average hourly wage has increased by 2.5% over the last year, indicating positive growth in the economy. Experts predict that these trends are likely to continue in the coming months, leading to further improvements in the labor market.

data.title: AAPL launches book to help physicians overcome career challenges and thrive in practice.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, in Washington, the American Association for Physician Leadership (AAPL) unveiled the launch of a groundbreaking book titled "How to Kickstart Your Medical Career and Succeed in Practice: Expert Tips and Wisdom from an Experienced Physician." This book, authored by a well-known figure in the field, offers invaluable guidance for medical professionals looking to excel in their careers.

data.title: Tech leaders including Brian Armstrong, Sam Bankman-Fried, and Sam Altman had their Spotify playlists leaked.
data.description: Numerous prominent tech figures, including Brian Armstrong, Sam Bankman-Fried, and Sam Altman, along with others, have reportedly had their Spotify accounts compromised, with sensitive information exposed.
BLACKROCK SENIOR PORTFOLIO MANAGER JEFF ROSENBERG: THE BIG NEWS TODAY IS THE REVISIONS

data.title: New approach "Open Board Search" is revolutionizing board recruitment for nonprofits per new SSIR.org article.
data.description: In San Francisco on August 1, 2025, an article published on SSIR.org titled "Open Board Search: How a Fresh Approach to Recruiting Board Members Can Revolutionize Nonprofits" addresses the ongoing issue faced by nonprofits. Many nonprofits typically select board members through traditional methods, but this piece proposes an innovative solution that could change the game.

data.title: Everest Medicines to invest US$30.9 million in I-Mab, reaching 16.1% ownership. I-Mab's antibody showed promise.
data.description: Everest plans to inject $30.9 million (around HK$242.6 million) into I-Mab, increasing their ownership to 16.1%. This investment comes as I-Mab's Claudin 18.2 x 4-1BB bispecific antibody, givastomig, shows promising results.

data.title: Fitness Ventures LLC acquires 3 Crunch locations in Portland, plans $75M expansion across the market by 2025.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, on August 1, 2025, Fitness Ventures LLC, a rapidly expanding franchise operator within the Crunch Fitness network, completed the acquisition of three current Crunch Fitness outlets in the area. This move marks a significant growth for Fitness Ventures LLC within the Portland market. The company has revealed plans to further develop these locations as part of the recent acquisition.

data.title: Hyundai Motor America achieves record July 2025 sales with 15% total sales increase and 18% retail sales climb. Electrified total sales up 50%. New 2026 Palisade released to dealers.
data.description: In July, there was a significant surge in sales with a record-setting performance. Total sales rose by 15% compared to previous figures, reaching unprecedented numbers. Retail sales saw even higher growth, climbing by an impressive 18%. Notably, models such as Elantra HEV, Palisade, IONIQ 5, and Santa Fe family achieved all-time monthly records. The electrified segment experienced a remarkable 50% increase in sales during the same period. Furthermore, the introduction of the highly anticipated 2026 Palisade, boasting innovative features, has commenced as the model is now available in dealerships.

data.title: Press freedom hostages Evan Gershkovich and Alsu Kurmasheva were recovered one year ago at Joint Base Andrews.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, a historic event took place as American journalists Evan Gershkovich and Alsu Kurmasheva were reunited with their families at Joint Base Andrews. Mike Balsamo, president of the National Press Club, shared this significant milestone. The emotional moment marked the end of their time in captivity, bringing relief to not only the individuals involved but also the broader community of journalists and supporters. This event highlights the enduring importance of press freedom and the commitment to upholding journalistic integrity. The reunion at Joint Base Andrews symbolizes the resilience and perseverance of the human spirit, with the journalists finally returning home after [number] days of uncertainty and hardship.

data.title: National Police Association backs LEO K9 Protection Act in response to rising attacks on police officers and K9s.
data.description: In Indianapolis on August 1, 2025, following the tragic death of a police K9, fellow officers and their families are left to mourn the loss. The rise in assaults on law enforcement personnel has led to a surge in attacks on K9 partners, worsening this heartbreaking situation. The proposed LEO K9 Protection Act (H.R....) aims to address this issue.
Effective Fed funds rate 4.33% July 31st vs 4.33% July 30th.
